transcript: Welcome everyone. Today we'll be discussing Vincent van Gogh's famous painting, Starry Night. This masterpiece, painted in 1889, is a testament to the artist's incredible ability to capture the essence of nature and human emotion. Van Gogh spent months capturing the night sky's beauty from his asylum bed, using bold, expressive brushstrokes to create a surreal vision of stars twinkling above a tormented world.
